meaning_ja: 幹から伸びる木の一部

meaning: a product made by a particular company
example_sentence: What brand of shoes do you prefer?
meaning_ja: 特定の会社が作った製品

meaning: a common food made from flour and water
example_sentence: I usually eat bread and butter for breakfast.
meaning_ja: 小麦粉と水から作られる一般的な食べ物

meaning: to separate into pieces by force; a short rest
example_sentence: Be careful not to break the glass. Let us take a short break.
meaning_ja: 力ずくでバラバラにすること。

meaning: the first meal of the day
example_sentence: I always eat breakfast at seven o'clock.
meaning_ja: その日の最初の食事

meaning: either of the two soft organs on a woman's chest
example_sentence: The mother held the baby to her breast.
meaning_ja: 女性の胸にある 2 つの柔らかい器官のいずれか

meaning: the air that you take in and blow out
example_sentence: He took a deep breath before speaking.
meaning_ja: あなたが吸って吐き出す空気

meaning: to take air into your lungs and send it out
example_sentence: It is hard to breathe in this hot room.
meaning_ja: 肺に空気を取り込んで送り出す

meaning: a structure built over a river or road
example_sentence: We walked across the old stone bridge.
meaning_ja: 川または道路の上に建てられた構造物

meaning: lasting only a short time; short
example_sentence: The manager gave a brief summary of the project.
meaning_ja: 短期間しか続かない。

meaning: shining with a lot of light
example_sentence: The stars are very bright tonight.
meaning_ja: たくさんの光で輝いている

meaning: to come to a place with someone/something
example_sentence: Please bring your dictionary to class tomorrow.
meaning_ja: 誰か/何かと一緒に場所に来ること

meaning: wide; including a large variety of things
example_sentence: He has a broad knowledge of world history.
meaning_ja: 広い;

meaning: a boy or man who has the same parents as you
example_sentence: My older brother is a university student.
meaning_ja: あなたと同じ両親を持つ少年または男性

meaning: having the color of earth or wood
example_sentence: He has brown hair and brown eyes.
meaning_ja: 土または木の色をしている

meaning: an object with bristles used for cleaning or painting
example_sentence: You should brush your teeth twice a day.
meaning_ja: 掃除や塗装に使用される毛のある物体

meaning: the amount of money available for a purpose
example_sentence: We are working on a very tight budget.
meaning_ja: ある目的に利用できるお金の量

meaning: to make something by putting parts together
example_sentence: They plan to build a new library here.
meaning_ja: 部品を組み合わせて何かを作ること

meaning: a structure with walls and a roof
example_sentence: That tall building is a famous hotel.
meaning_ja: 壁と屋根のある構造物

meaning: a small metal object fired from a gun
example_sentence: The bullet hit the target precisely.
meaning_ja: 銃から発射される小さな金属製の物体

meaning: a group of things growing or tied together
example_sentence: He bought a bunch of flowers for his mother.
meaning_ja: 成長している、または一緒に結びついているもののグループ

meaning: to damage or destroy something by fire
example_sentence: The campfire began to burn brightly.
meaning_ja: 火によって物を損傷したり破壊したりすること

meaning: to break open suddenly
example_sentence: The balloon will burst if you blow it up more.
meaning_ja: 突然こじ開ける

meaning: to put a dead body or object in the ground
example_sentence: They decided to bury the treasure under the tree.
meaning_ja: 死体や物体を地面に埋めること

meaning: a large vehicle that carries passengers along a route
example_sentence: I catch the bus to school every morning.
meaning_ja: ルートに沿って乗客を運ぶ大型車両

meaning: the activity of making, buying, or selling things
example_sentence: He started a new import-export business.
meaning_ja: 物を作る、買う、または売る活動

meaning: having a lot of things to do; not free
example_sentence: She is busy preparing for her exams.
meaning_ja: やるべきことがたくさんある。

meaning: used to introduce a contrasting statement
example_sentence: I want to go, but I have no money.
meaning_ja: 対照的な発言を導入するために使用される

meaning: a yellow fat made from milk
example_sentence: Please spread some butter on the toast.
meaning_ja: 牛乳から作られた黄色の脂肪

meaning: a small round object used to fasten clothes
example_sentence: He lost a button from his shirt.
meaning_ja: 衣服を留めるために使用される小さな丸い物体

meaning: to get something by paying money
example_sentence: I want to buy some fresh fruit.
meaning_ja: お金を払って何かを得る

meaning: near; not later than; through the action of
example_sentence: The school is by the river. Please finish it by Monday.
meaning_ja: 近く;

meaning: a small simple house, usually made of wood
example_sentence: We stayed in a cozy cabin in the woods.
meaning_ja: 小さくてシンプルな家、通常は木で作られています

meaning: a piece of furniture with shelves or drawers
example_sentence: Keep the cups in the kitchen cabinet.
meaning_ja: 棚または引き出しが付いた家具

meaning: a strong thick wire or rope
example_sentence: The television is connected to the cable.
meaning_ja: 強くて太いワイヤーまたはロープ

meaning: a sweet baked food made from flour and sugar
example_sentence: She baked a chocolate cake for my birthday.
meaning_ja: 小麦粉と砂糖から作られた甘い焼き菓子

meaning: to find a number using math
example_sentence: We need to calculate the cost of our trip.
meaning_ja: 数学を使って数値を見つけるには

meaning: to give a name; to telephone someone
example_sentence: Please call me when you arrive.
meaning_ja: 名前を付けること。

meaning: peaceful, quiet, and not worried
example_sentence: The sea was very calm this morning.
meaning_ja: 平和で静かで心配がない

meaning: a device used for taking photos or videos
example_sentence: He bought a new digital camera.
meaning_ja: 写真やビデオを撮影するために使用されるデバイス

meaning: a place where people stay in tents
example_sentence: We set up our camp near the river.
meaning_ja: 人々がテントに泊まる場所

meaning: a planned series of activities to achieve a goal
example_sentence: The politician started his election campaign.
meaning_ja: 目標を達成するために計画された一連の活動

meaning: to be able to do something

meaning_ja: 何かができるようになる

meaning: to decide that a planned event will not happen
example_sentence: They had to cancel the meeting due to rain.
meaning_ja: 予定されていた出来事が起こらないと決定する

meaning: a serious disease caused by abnormal cells
example_sentence: He is recovering from cancer treatment.
meaning_ja: 異常な細胞によって引き起こされる深刻な病気

meaning: a person who is trying to be elected
example_sentence: She is a candidate for the mayor position.
meaning_ja: 当選しようとしている人

meaning: a stick of wax that burns to give light
example_sentence: We lit a candle when the power went out.
meaning_ja: 燃えて光を与える蝋の棒

meaning: sweet food made with sugar
example_sentence: Kids love eating colorful candy.
meaning_ja: 砂糖を使った甘い食べ物

meaning: a type of soft hat with a curved front part
example_sentence: He wore a baseball cap to block the sun.
meaning_ja: 前部が湾曲したソフトハットの一種

meaning: having the ability to do something well

meaning_ja: 何かをうまくやる能力がある

meaning: the maximum amount that something can contain
example_sentence: The stadium has a capacity of fifty thousand.
meaning_ja: 何かが含むことができる最大量

meaning: the city where the government is located
example_sentence: Paris is the capital of France.
meaning_ja: 政府がある都市

meaning: the person in command of a ship or team

meaning_ja: 船またはチームの指揮をとる人

meaning: to catch a person or animal by force
example_sentence: The soldiers managed to capture the castle.
meaning_ja: 人や動物を力ずくで捕まえる

meaning: a road vehicle with four wheels and an engine
example_sentence: She drives a small red car to work.
meaning_ja: 4つの車輪とエンジンを備えた道路車両

meaning: a small piece of stiff paper or plastic
example_sentence: He paid for the groceries with a credit card.
meaning_ja: 硬い紙またはプラスチックの小片

meaning: to feel interest or worry about someone/something
example_sentence: I really care about my family's health.
meaning_ja: 誰か/何かについて興味や心配を感じること

meaning: a job or profession that you do for a long time
example_sentence: She wants a career in medical research.
meaning_ja: あなたが長期間行う仕事または職業

meaning: giving attention to avoid danger or mistakes
example_sentence: Please be careful when you cross the street.
meaning_ja: 危険や間違いを避けるために注意を払う

meaning: not giving enough attention to avoid mistakes
example_sentence: It was careless of him to lose his keys.
meaning_ja: 間違いを避けるために十分な注意を払っていない

meaning: goods carried on a ship, plane, or truck
example_sentence: The cargo ship arrived at the port today.
meaning_ja: 船、飛行機、またはトラックで運ばれる商品

meaning: a thick heavy cover for a floor
example_sentence: We bought a soft blue carpet for the living room.
meaning_ja: 床用の厚くて重いカバー

meaning: a vehicle with wheels pulled by horses
example_sentence: They rode in a horse-drawn carriage.
meaning_ja: 馬が引く車輪のついた乗り物

meaning: to hold and move something to another place
example_sentence: Could you help me carry these heavy bags?
meaning_ja: 何かを保持して別の場所に移動する

meaning: a particular situation or example of something
example_sentence: In this case, the rules do not apply.
meaning_ja: 特定の状況または何かの例

meaning: money in the form of coins or notes
example_sentence: Do you want to pay in cash or by card?
meaning_ja: 硬貨または紙幣の形のお金

meaning: to throw something; all the actors in a play
example_sentence: He cast his fishing line into the water.
meaning_ja: 何かを投げる。

meaning: a large strong building built in the past
example_sentence: We visited a beautiful historic castle in Europe.
meaning_ja: 過去に建てられた大きくて丈夫な建物

meaning: a small furry animal kept as a pet
example_sentence: A cat is sleeping on the windowsill.
meaning_ja: ペットとして飼われている毛皮で覆われた小さな動物

meaning: to stop and hold a moving object
example_sentence: Try to catch the ball before it drops.
meaning_ja: 動いている物体を止めて保持すること

meaning: a group of people or things with shared qualities
example_sentence: Which category does this book belong to?
meaning_ja: 共通の性質を持つ人々または物事のグループ

meaning: to make something happen; the reason for something
example_sentence: A small spark can cause a large forest fire.
meaning_ja: 何かを実現すること。

meaning: a large natural hole in the side of a hill
example_sentence: We explored a dark cave on our vacation.
meaning_ja: 丘の側面にある大きな自然の穴

meaning: the inner surface of the top of a room
example_sentence: They painted the bedroom ceiling white.
meaning_ja: 部屋の上部の内面

meaning: to do something special for an event
example_sentence: We went out to celebrate her graduation.
meaning_ja: イベントのために何か特別なことをする

meaning: a famous person
example_sentence: She became a global celebrity after the movie.
meaning_ja: 有名人

meaning: the smallest basic unit of a living thing
example_sentence: Red blood cells carry oxygen around the body.
meaning_ja: the smallest basic unit of a living thing

meaning: an area of ground where dead people are buried
example_sentence: We placed flowers on the grave in the cemetery.
meaning_ja: 死者が埋葬されている地面の領域

meaning: the middle point or part of something

meaning_ja: 何かの中間点または部分

meaning: located in the middle of something

meaning_ja: 何かの真ん中に位置する

meaning: a period of one hundred years
example_sentence: We live in the twenty-first century.
meaning_ja: 百年の期間

meaning: a formal public or religious event
example_sentence: The wedding ceremony was beautiful.
meaning_ja: 正式な公的行事または宗教的な行事

meaning: sure and having no doubt about something

meaning_ja: 確かに、何かについて何の疑問も持たない

meaning: without any doubt; definitely
example_sentence: I will certainly help you with your project.
meaning_ja: without any doubt;

meaning: a row of metal rings connected together
example_sentence: He locked his bicycle with a strong chain.
meaning_ja: 一緒に接続された金属リングの列

meaning: a piece of furniture for one person to sit on
example_sentence: Please take a chair and sit down.
meaning_ja: 一人が座るための家具

meaning: the person in charge of a meeting or company

meaning_ja: 会議や会社の責任者

meaning: something new and difficult that needs effort

meaning_ja: 努力が必要な新しくて難しいこと

meaning: a hall or large room for formal meetings

meaning_ja: 公式な会議のためのホールまたは大きな部屋

meaning: a person or team that wins a competition

meaning_ja: 競争に勝つ人またはチーム

meaning: the possibility of something happening
example_sentence: Is there any chance of rain today?
meaning_ja: 何かが起こる可能性

meaning: to make or become different; to swap

meaning_ja: 違うものを作る、あるいは変わること。

meaning: a television station; a route for water

meaning_ja: テレビ局。

meaning: a state of total confusion and lack of order

meaning_ja: 完全な混乱と秩序の欠如の状態

meaning: a section of a book with a number or title

meaning_ja: 番号またはタイトルが付いた本のセクション

meaning: the qualities of a person; a person in a book

meaning: the price asked for goods or services

meaning_ja: 商品またはサービスに要求される価格

meaning: an organization that helps people in need

meaning: a drawing that shows information simply

meaning: to run after someone/something to catch them

meaning: to talk in a friendly, informal way

meaning: costing little money; not expensive

meaning: to examine something to make sure it is correct

meaning: either side of the face below the eyes

meaning_ja: 顔の両側の目の下

meaning: to shout loudly to show approval or support
example_sentence: The crowd began to cheer for the team.
meaning_ja: 承認や支持を示すために大声で叫ぶこと

meaning: happy and showing it by behavior

meaning_ja: 幸せでそれを行動で示す

meaning: a yellow or white food made from milk

meaning_ja: 牛乳から作られた黄色または白色の食品

meaning: a professional cook in a restaurant

meaning: a substance produced by chemistry

meaning: the scientific study of substances

meaning: the upper front part of the body

meaning: a common bird kept for its eggs and meat

meaning_ja: 卵と肉のために飼われる一般的な鳥

meaning: most important; leader of a group

meaning_ja: 最も重要なこと。

meaning: a young human who is not yet an adult

meaning: the part of the face below the mouth

meaning: a sweet brown food made from cocoa

meaning_ja: カカオから作られた甘い茶色の食べ物

meaning: the act of choosing between things

meaning: to pick someone or something from a group

meaning: a completely round flat shape
